name: Mineros S.A.
description: With 50 years of experience in Central and South America, Mineros is dedicated to sustainable mining practices that protect the environment, enhance stakeholder well-being, and promote economic and social growth. The company manages a diversified portfolio and strives to become a leading intermediate gold producer through responsible practices. Mineros focuses on delivering consistent returns and value to shareholders by developing local talent and fostering community collaboration across its operations in Colombia, Nicaragua, and Chile.
